room.caption: [G2-EncC] I never did like the desert encounters.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=global.newMapX newMapY=global.newMapY if global.newMapY<10000 toRoom=rLink2_Overworld else toRoom=rLink2_Overworld2
